variants: Hamish Macrae currently resides in Pinehaven Forge, having been born in Rosebrae Court. As an employee at Zinnia Peak Hotels, he has achieved notable success in the hospitality industry. In addition to his work, Hamish authored Patchwork Emissary Chip, a book centered on cutting-edge technological applications. His contributions to the field were recognized when he received the Kingfisher Constellation Honor. Through his innovative spirit and dedication, Hamish continues to leave an indelible mark on both his career and creative pursuits.
